title: Developing AI Apps and Agents on Azure
description: Plan, build, and operate generative AI and agentic solutions on Microsoft Foundry — models, RAG, agents, vision, speech, text analysis, and information extraction.
doc_title: AI-103 Study Guide (Community Edition) — Azure AI Apps & Agents
brand_sub: Azure AI Apps & Agents — Study Guide
passing_note: AI-103 passes at 700/1000. Microsoft does not publish the raw-score mapping, so the readiness estimate below is unofficial and based on percent correct only.
